sections.paragraph: m. vinegar, Num 6:3 Rth 2:14 Psa 69:22. Ὄμφαξ is the rendering of the old versions, Ps. loc. cit., and Pro 10:26 and this is defended by Michaëlis, in Suppl. p. 828; but the common rendering is not unsuitable to any of the passages [and we know that vinegar is the meaning in Psa 69:22 ].
